title: Add an additional animated mascot to the Mathematics page

requirements.summary: Render a new decorative, lightweight-animated mascot on the Mathematics page without interfering with content interaction, respecting reduced-motion and responsive breakpoints.
acceptanceCriteria: A new mascot image is displayed on the Mathematics page (frontend/src/pages/MathematicsPage.tsx) as a decorative, animated element.
The mascot does not block clicks/taps on page content (uses pointer-events-none) and is marked decorative for assistive tech (empty alt and/or aria-hidden=true).
The animation is lightweight and consistent with existing motion styles (e.g., float/bounce-gentle/wiggle) and is disabled when the user prefers reduced motion (e.g., via motion-reduce:animate-none).
The mascot is responsive and does not overlap important UI on common breakpoints (hidden on small screens or positioned safely).

file_operations.description: Add a new decorative mascot element that references the local static asset (mascot-rocketfox.dim_768x768.png), positioned safely (absolute within a relative page wrapper), non-interactive (pointer-events-none), decorative for assistive tech (alt="" and aria-hidden), uses an existing lightweight animation class (e.g., animate-float or animate-bounce-gentle) with motion-reduce:animate-none, and is hidden on smaller screens (e.g., hidden lg:block) to avoid overlapping important UI.

requirements.summary: Add the new mascot as a local static asset under frontend/public/assets/generated and reference it using existing mascot asset conventions.
acceptanceCriteria: The new mascot image file exists in frontend/public/assets/generated with the exact filename specified in this build request.
The new mascot is loaded via a static /assets/generated/... path (no backend/image proxy).
No existing mascot assets (e.g., mascot-robotcat.dim_768x768.png, mascot-girl.dim_768x768.png) are removed or broken.

file_operations.description: Add the generated original, non-copyrighted cartoon mascot illustration file exactly named frontend/public/assets/generated/mascot-rocketfox.dim_768x768.png for static serving and use in the Mathematics page.

Ensure the new mascot element loads the image via the static path /assets/generated/mascot-rocketfox.dim_768x768.png and follows the same asset conventions used by existing mascots (no changes to other mascot references).
